refined_caption: The hospital waiting room is overcrowded with patients waiting in line. There are many people standing and sitting, indicating a lack of available seating.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital today and was shocked to see how crowded the waiting room was. There were not enough seats for all the patients, and many were forced to stand or sit on the floor. This made the waiting experience very uncomfortable and frustrating.
voice_text: The waiting room is super crowded, there's nowhere to sit. It's really uncomfortable and frustrating to wait like this.
